summary: The user discussed issues related to their nasal spray prescription from Dr. Patel and shared that a recent biopsy from dermatologist Dr. Lee was benign. They sought advice on managing chronic sinusitis and preparing for an upcoming colonoscopy, including questions to ask their doctor and post-procedure care.
facts: The user has a nasal spray prescription from Dr. Patel. The user had a follow-up appointment with dermatologist Dr. Lee for a biopsy on a suspicious mole on their back, which was benign. The user is experiencing congestion and fatigue due to chronic sinusitis. The user is considering getting a colonoscopy, which they have been putting off. The user plans to ask their doctor about dietary restrictions after the colonoscopy. The user is interested in knowing what exercises or activities to avoid after the colonoscopy.
